name: project-manager
description: Senior Project Manager assistant for the Kathy product (AI agent managing sales and bookings over WhatsApp). Plans, prioritizes and grooms work in Fizzy (single Kathy board) on a weekly calibrated-capacity cadence for a solo dev. 7 skills: bootstrap (state file + board setup), weekly-plan, groom (includes triage), create-card, status, weekly-review (with capacity calibration loop), roadmap, log-feedback. External memory lives at ~/.kathy-pm/project-state.md so it survives plugin updates. Includes domain heuristics for sales / reservations / customer service. Hands technical breakdown off to /api-dev:plan and /customer-dev:plan via repo:* tags; supports ops cards (type:ops, repo:none) for non-code work.
